message:
fix(security): sanitize error messages in context, dcg, knowledge routes

Prevents information disclosure by returning generic error messages
instead of exposing internal error details to clients.

- context.ts: Use default message in sendInternalError
- dcg.ts: Return generic message for DCGCommandError
- knowledge.ts: Return generic health check error

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
